title: Anti Op
description: This is a anti operators plugin to discourage cheaters who try to cheat with operator permissions
body:
This is a anti Operators plugin that deops everyone who tries to Cheat.          
Anti Op triggers:
Changing gamemode, Server start/stop,  Changing world, Joining, command:"/op"       
Ban triggers:         
If player tries to go out of Creative or Spectator gamemode(undo this by "/pardon [playername]" in consol)

This Plugin should work on every version 1.16+

(I also now have a [Fiverr](https://de.fiverr.com/s/P2E3dAw) where you can place custom plugin orders!)
